app.name: TaskFlow
app.skeletonReady: Frontend skeleton is ready. Screens land in the next phases.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Log in to your TaskFlow workspace.
auth.signup.title: Create your workspace
auth.signup.subtitle: Start organizing your team's work.
auth.accept.title: Accept your invitation
auth.accept.subtitle: Set up your account to join the workspace.
auth.accept.expired: This invitation has expired. Ask an admin to resend it.
auth.accept.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
auth.reset.title: Reset your password
auth.reset.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.reset.sent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent password reset instructions.
auth.newPassword.title: Choose a new password
auth.newPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.newPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.newPassword.done: Your password has been updated. Log in with your new password.
